```python
import requests

# 查询李明和王芳在2026年3月2日的日程
date = "2026-03-02"

# 获取李明日程
resp_li = requests.post("http://localhost:37565/calendar/user_events", 
                         json={"user": "李明", "date": date})
print("=== 李明日程 ===")
print(resp_li.status_code)
print(resp_li.json() if resp_li.status_code == 200 else resp_li.text)

# 获取王芳日程
resp_wang = requests.post("http://localhost:37565/calendar/user_events", 
                           json={"user": "王芳", "date": date})
print("\n=== 王芳日程 ===")
print(resp_wang.status_code)
print(resp_wang.json() if resp_wang.status_code == 200 else resp_wang.text)

import requests

# 创建项目同步会
event_data = {
    "title": "项目同步会",
    "start_time": "2026-03-02T10:00:00",
    "end_time": "2026-03-02T11:00:00",
    "attendees": ["李明", "王芳"],
    "location": ""
}

resp = requests.post("http://localhost:37565/calendar/events/create", json=event_data)
print("=== 创建会议结果 ===")
print(f"状态码: {resp.status_code}")
print(f"响应: {resp.json() if resp.status_code == 200 else resp.text}")
